typography.headings: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, or Outfit (Avoid Inter/Roboto)
typography.monospace: IBM Plex Mono or Space Mono (Critical for all data labels, scores, and badges)

layout.strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense, rigid, high data density). 0px to 2px max border-radius for sharp, tactical feel.
layout.spacing: Dense paddings (p-4 to p-6) inside panels. Sharp delineations using 1px borders instead of soft shadows.

intel_catalog_grid.layout: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 align-items-start
intel_catalog_grid.card_style: bg-[var(--panel)] border border-[var(--line)] rounded-sm relative transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[var(--accent-dim)] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(182,255,58,0.1)] p-5 flex flex-col gap-4

data_confidence_score.bar_style: h-1.5 flex-1 bg-[var(--bg-2)] overflow-hidden rounded-none border border-[var(--line)]

threat_risk_level.style: flex items-center gap-2 px-2.5 py-1 text-[11px] font-mono font-bold uppercase tracking-wider border

operational_value_tier.style: absolute top-0 right-0 px-3 py-1 bg-[var(--panel-2)] border-l border-b border-[var(--line)] text-xs font-mono text-[var(--muted)] uppercase tracking-widest
operational_value_tier.iconography: Minimal geometric SVG shapes (triangle for Strategic, square for Tactical) alongside text.

verification_node_badges.style: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 text-[10px] font-mono uppercase tracking-wide border border-[var(--line-2)] text-[var(--muted)] bg-[var(--bg)] rounded-sm
verification_node_badges.icon: Prefix with a small solid dot or Lucide icon (e.g., CheckCircle2) that lights up in --accent if verified.

rfp_agency_modal.layout: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm p-4
rfp_agency_modal.panel_style: w-full max-w-2xl bg-[var(--bg)] border-2 border-[var(--line)] shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.9)] p-6 md:p-8 rounded-sm relative
rfp_agency_modal.trust_signals: 'SECURE ENCLAVE / AES-256' micro-text in the header. Add digital noise/grain subtle background texture.
rfp_agency_modal.fields: Agency Name, Contact, Email, Target Regions, Sectors, Budget, Timeline, Classification Level. Use Shadcn-style inputs but override with sharp borders focus:border-[var(--accent)] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[var(--accent)]
rfp_agency_modal.submit_button: w-full bg-[var(--accent)] text-black font-bold uppercase font-mono tracking-widest py-3 px-6 hover:bg-white transition-colors mt-4

secure_checkout_cart_bar.layout: sticky bottom-0 z-40 w-full p-4 border-t border-[var(--accent-dim)] bg-[var(--bg)]/95 backdrop-blur flex items-center justify-between
secure_checkout_cart_bar.content: Left: Selected packages count. Right: Total credits & Atomic Purchase CTA.
secure_checkout_cart_bar.atomic_button: px-6 py-2 bg-[var(--bg-2)] border border-[var(--accent)] text-[var(--accent)] hover:bg-[var(--accent)] hover:text-black font-mono uppercase transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(182,255,58,0.2)]

interactions.animations: Minimal. Use sharp, fast transitions (duration-150 ease-out). No bouncy springs. Everything should snap like military hardware.
interactions.hover_states: Cards highlight border. Buttons invert colors (terminal style).

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements, buttons, inputs, and intelligence cards MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='intel-card-mx-match', data-testid='rfp-submit', data-testid='checkout-atomic-btn'.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Enhance /app/frontend/src/components/Storefront.jsx using the tactical/SOC identity without changing the core file structure.
2. Ensure all CSS modifications are scoped inside the existing variables from /app/frontend/src/index.css.
3. Implement the rigid 'Control Room Grid' for .intel-grid.
4. Build the RFP modal with sharp borders, monospace inputs, and prominent trust signals.
5. Style the cart bar as a tactical HUD element anchored to the bottom.
6. Do NOT introduce new UI libraries for layout; stick to Tailwind + the existing component pattern.
7. Ensure the Llama 3 'Data Confidence Score' dominates the visual hierarchy of the intel cards using neon lime dropshadows.
8. MUST add 'data-testid' to all key interactive elements.
